title: Support - App, user not logged ever, dialog
scenario: Guest user in Poly Studio Mobile app is prompted to log in with Poly Lens account when tapping App button in Support screen
steps: 1. Install the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Open the hamburger menu (three-line icon in the top-left corner).
5. On the Support screen, tap the "App" button.
expected: No login dialog should appear, or the user should remain in guest mode without being prompted to log in.
